text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: She's so cute! I just can't resist the urge to just squeeze her!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to make her a ribbon and some other
accessories when I get home.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what will suit her best... Hehe, I can't
wait! ♪
